breakdown: PR adds normalization logic to handle LLM-generated rewards_box with non-standard keys (xp/gold_pieces instead of xp_gained/gold). Changes include a new normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function in world_logic.py, integration into the streaming passthrough path, and a comprehensive E2E test. Test coverage is excellent with real LLM testing. Minor issues: missing function docstring, incorrect comment (says 'boolean representations' when referring to key names), and limited visible type annotations.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function to handle non-standard reward keys (xp → xp_gained, gold_pieces → gold)
Integrated normalize_rewards_box_for_ui into _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair for passthrough rewards
Added pop() calls to remove non-standard keys after normalization
Added WHY comment explaining LLM-generated payloads use non-standard representations
